### ℹ Artifact update notice

##### File name: go.mod

In order to perform the update(s) described in the table above, Renovate ran the `go get` command, which resulted in the following additional change(s):


- 1 additional dependency was updated


Details:


| **Package**                | **Change**                                       |
| :------------------------- | :----------------------------------------------- |
| `github.com/docker/docker` | `v28.1.1+incompatible` -> `v28.2.1+incompatible` |

[APPROVALNOTIFIER] This PR is **NOT APPROVED** This pull-request has been approved by: *renovate[bot]* **Once this PR has been reviewed and has the lgtm label**, please assign [mheon](https://github.com/mheon) for approval. The full list of commands accepted by this bot can be found [here](https://go.k8s.io/bot-commands?repo=containers%2Fpodman).
Needs approval from an approver in each of these files: - **[OWNERS](https://github.com/containers/podman/blob/main/OWNERS)** Approvers can indicate their approval by writing `/approve` in a comment Approvers can cancel approval by writing `/approve cancel` in a comment
[NON-BLOCKING] Packit jobs failed. @containers/packit-build please check. Everyone else, feel free to ignore.

`docker/docker` changing data structures again…
One half looks easy; for the other, Docker is removing fields in the new API, but if we are claiming compatibility with an earlier API version, we should probably preserve them.

The edits in https://github.com/containers/podman/pull/26249 might be a starting point.

> `docker/docker` changing data structures again… 

I guess that should updated directly in https://github.com/containers/podman/pull/26227 .
